name: kpneumo_hs11286_capsule_K_locus
description: K-antigen capsular polysaccharide biosynthesis locus (cps/wzi-wzc-wzy-wzx). HS11286 is serotype K47 (KL47). The K-locus is the most variable region of the K. pneumoniae chromosome with >130 known serotypes — cross-strain reads are frequently multi-mapping.
